d: Passive. Kafra prioritizes attacking the enemy who carries Forest Mark. Kafra inflicts a Forest Mark on an enemy when casting Ultimate and launches a mighty strike, dealing [[500%]]<ATK> damage and knocking them back for [[2]]-tile. Only 1 Forest Mark exists per attack.

When a marked enemy is out of Kafra's attack range, Kafra charges towards the enemy, dealing [[280%]]<ATK> damage and stunning them for [[1.5]]s. If there's no marked enemy, Kafra marks the nearest enemy and casts the skill.
The Forest Mark reduces the enemy's Phys DEF by [[6%]]. When a marked enemy is defeated, Kafra and allies within 2 tiles of this enemy recover [[100%]]<ATK> HP every [[0.38]]s for [[1.13]]s.

When a marked enemy receives healing from other enemies, Kafra jumps to the healer and attacks them, dealing [[250%]]<ATK> damage and reducing their Haste by [[40]] for [[5]]s. Kafra is [[unaffected|uncontrol]] during the period.
Kafra gains a shield that can block [[350%]]<ATK> damage for [[5]]s while casting this skill.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 12 Ranged DEF, 12 DEF Penetration.

d: The damage of Relentless Chase's first casting in battle is increased to [[520%]]<ATK>.
